applicability_notes: ttnn_replacement: ttnn.cumprod(ttnn_input_tensor, dim, dtype={DTYPE}, reverse_order={REVERSE_ORDER}, out={OUT_TENSOR}, memory_config={MEMORY_CONFIG}); constraints: {'layout': 'TILE', 'shape_preserving': True, 'notes': ['Output shape equals input shape.', 'Implicit tile padding must be filled (e.g. ttnn.fill_implicit_tile_padding) so padded values do not corrupt the cumulative product.', 'reverse_order=True corresponds to torch flip-cumprod-flip pattern, used for cumprod backward: torch.cumprod(x, dim).grad accumulation.', "Preallocated 'out' tensor must match shape and dtype of result; mismatched memory_config/shape raises RuntimeError."]}

placement_observations.source: unit_test: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.Layout.TILE, device=device) with default memory_config
